summary.verdict_desc: 本周计数 5 红 / 8 黄 / 10 绿，与上周持平，red_pct 维持 21.7%、加权风险分维持 39.1%，状态层面无指标翻灯——但水面之下的情绪与价格已明显转向。本周 AI 板块出现年内较大单周回撤：NVDA 周五（6/5）单日跌 6.2% 至 $205.10，Broadcom 因拒绝上调其 $100B AI 芯片目标、仅维持指引而暴跌约 15%，市场对"高 capex 必须配兑现"的要求进一步升温，资本开支指引的惩罚机制由偶发向系统性逼近。基础判读本在观察期（red_pct<25%），但分类强制升级再次生效：估值 2/3 红（CAPE ≈41.5、Top-5 ≈27.5%）叠加资金面 3/4 红（Mag4 FCF 深度负值、VC AI 占比 80-81%、NVDA 客户投资/收入 43%）。本周关键事件：SpaceX IPO 定价敲定为固定 $135/股、拟售 5.556 亿股募资约 $75B、估值 $1.77T，6/11 定价、6/12 纳斯达克挂牌（SPCX），将成史上最大 IPO；Anthropic 5/28 估值逼近 $1T、run-rate 收入维持约 $47B 领先 OpenAI ~$33B；CoreWeave 关联数据中心 6/2 发行 $900M 高收益债、利率降至 7.5%（4 月为 9.75%），顶级 DC ABS 利差近周收窄约 60bps，数据中心融资条件边际改善；Fed 6/17 会议维持概率 99.4%、higher-for-longer 延续。估值 + 资金面双类共振触发分类强制升级。
summary.verdict_desc_en: This week prints 5 red / 8 yellow / 10 green, unchanged from last week; red_pct holds at 21.7% and the weighted risk score stays at 39.1% with no status flips — yet sentiment and price beneath the surface have clearly turned. The AI complex saw one of its sharpest weekly drawdowns of the year: NVDA fell 6.2% on Friday June 5 to $205.10, and Broadcom plunged ~15% after refusing to raise its $100B AI-chip target and merely reaffirming guidance. The market's insistence that heavy capex be matched by delivery is intensifying, pushing the capex-guidance punishment regime from episodic toward systematic. The base framework reads Observation (red_pct < 25%), but the category override fires again: valuation 2/3 RED (CAPE ≈41.5, Top-5 ≈27.5%) plus capital 3/4 RED (Mag4 FCF deeply negative, VC AI share 80-81%, NVDA customer-financing 43%). Key events: SpaceX's IPO was fixed at $135/share, selling 555.6M shares to raise ~$75B at a $1.77T valuation, pricing June 11 and listing on Nasdaq June 12 (SPCX) — set to be the largest IPO ever; Anthropic neared a $1T valuation on May 28 and holds a ~$47B run-rate, ahead of OpenAI's ~$33B; a CoreWeave-tied data center sold $900M of high-yield notes on June 2 at 7.5% (down from 9.75% in April), with top-rated DC ABS spreads tightening ~60bps recently — financing conditions for data centers improved at the margin; the Fed's June 17 meeting carries 99.4% hold odds as higher-for-longer persists. Valuation + capital dual-category resonance triggers the forced upgrade.

wow_changes.from: 分化加剧（Q1 财报 3 罚 1 奖）
wow_changes.to: 惩罚加深（AI 板块单周回撤）
wow_changes.note: 本周 AI 板块大幅回撤：Broadcom 因仅维持、拒绝上调其 $100B AI 芯片目标暴跌约 15%，NVDA 周五跌 6.2% 至 $205.10；市场对 AI 资本开支叙事的容忍度下降，惩罚机制由偶发向系统性逼近，但仍未达全面系统性惩罚，维持黄灯
wow_changes.note_en: The AI complex sold off hard this week: Broadcom plunged ~15% after merely reaffirming — rather than raising — its $100B AI-chip target, and NVDA fell 6.2% Friday to $205.10; the market's tolerance for the AI-capex narrative is fading and the punishment regime is edging from episodic toward systematic, though not yet fully systematic — stays yellow

wow_changes.to: 升温（SpaceX 定价 $135、史上最大 IPO）
wow_changes.note: SpaceX IPO 定价敲定为固定 $135/股，拟售 5.556 亿股募资约 $75B（绿鞋另加 $11.2B）、估值 $1.77T，6/11 定价、6/12 纳斯达克挂牌（SPCX），将成史上最大 IPO、跻身美股市值前七；Anthropic、OpenAI 招股推进，但具体公司数仍 <10 未达洪流
wow_changes.note_en: SpaceX's IPO was fixed at $135/share, selling 555.6M shares to raise ~$75B (plus an $11.2B greenshoe) at a $1.77T valuation, pricing June 11 and listing on Nasdaq June 12 (SPCX) — the largest IPO ever and a top-seven US company by market cap; Anthropic and OpenAI offerings advance, but the company count is still under 10, short of a Flood

wow_changes.to: 收窄加速（CoreWeave 关联 HY 6 月 7.5%）
wow_changes.note: CoreWeave 关联数据中心 6/2 发行 $900M 五年期高收益债、利率降至 7.5%（4 月 $2.75B 同期为 9.75%），顶级 DC ABS 利差近周再收窄约 60bps；数据中心融资条件边际明显改善，信用市场对 AI 基建仍未现压力
wow_changes.note_en: A CoreWeave-tied data center sold $900M of five-year high-yield notes on June 2 at 7.5% (vs 9.75% on April's $2.75B deal), and top-rated DC ABS spreads tightened ~60bps in recent weeks; financing conditions for data centers improved markedly at the margin, with credit markets still showing no stress on AI infrastructure

wow_changes.note: NVDA 周五重挫 6.2% 后远期 PE 降至约 23x（GuruFocus 23.01、StockAnalysis 22.0、FinanceCharts 24.51，区间 22-24.5x），较 12 个月均值 43 折让逾 27%；FY28 EPS 持续上修使倍数维持历史低位，NVDA 自身估值并非泡沫源头，维持绿灯
wow_changes.note_en: After Friday's 6.2% drop, NVDA's forward PE eased to ~23x (GuruFocus 23.01, StockAnalysis 22.0, FinanceCharts 24.51; range 22-24.5x), a 27%+ discount to its 12-month average of 43; ongoing FY28 EPS upgrades keep the multiple historically low — NVDA's own valuation is not the bubble's source, stays green

wow_changes.note: S&P 500 50 日均线上方比例 6/5 收于约 54.6%（5/29 为 52.3%），仍处 40-60% 黄区；但周五 AI 板块普跌或令次周广度再度承压，头部独涨与广度脆弱并存，维持黄灯
wow_changes.note_en: The share of S&P 500 names above their 50-day average closed near 54.6% on June 5 (52.3% on May 29), still inside the 40-60% yellow band; but Friday's broad AI decline may pressure breadth again next week — top-heavy leadership and fragile breadth coexist, stays yellow

indicators.note: CAPE 约 41.5（multpl 41.57、GuruFocus 39.8），仍是 155 年来第 2 高、距 2000 年峰值 44.19 仅约 6%；earnings yield 仅 ~2.4%，即便本周 AI 板块回撤，整体估值仍处极度拉伸区
indicators.note_en: CAPE sits near 41.5 (multpl 41.57, GuruFocus 39.8), still the 2nd-highest reading in 155 years and only ~6% below the 2000 peak of 44.19; the earnings yield is just ~2.4%, and even after this week's AI pullback valuations remain extremely stretched

indicators.note: S&P 500 前 10 大权重约 37%、Top-5 合计 ≈27.5%（MSFT / AAPL / NVDA / AMZN / GOOGL）；本周 AI 板块回撤令集中度略有松动，但仍贴近 2000 年极值，市值高度押注少数 AI 龙头
indicators.note_en: The S&P 500's top 10 weigh ~37% and the Top-5 (MSFT / AAPL / NVDA / AMZN / GOOGL) total ≈27.5%; this week's AI pullback loosened concentration slightly, but it still hugs the 2000 extreme as index value bets heavily on a handful of AI leaders

indicators.note: 周五重挫 6.2% 后远期 PE 降至约 23x（GuruFocus 23.01、StockAnalysis 22.0、FinanceCharts 24.51，区间 22-24.5x），较 12 个月均值 43 折让逾 27%；FY28 EPS 持续上修使倍数维持历史低位，估值并非泡沫源头
indicators.note_en: After Friday's 6.2% drop, forward PE eased to ~23x (GuruFocus 23.01, StockAnalysis 22.0, FinanceCharts 24.51; range 22-24.5x), a 27%+ discount to the 12-month average of 43; ongoing FY28 EPS upgrades keep the multiple historically low — NVDA's own valuation is not the bubble's source

indicators.threshold_text: 指引下调=红 / 加速=黄 / 稳健=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Guidance cut = red / Accelerating = yellow / Steady = green
indicators.note: 四大 hyperscaler 2026 capex 合计约 $725B（AMZN $200B、GOOGL ~$190B、MSFT $190B、META $125-145B），YoY +77%，约 75%（$450B）投向 AI 基础设施，无一下调指引；但本周 Broadcom 拒绝上调 $100B AI 芯片目标，供应端首现"不再加码"信号，继续加速但边际谨慎
indicators.note_en: The four hyperscalers guide ~$725B of 2026 capex (AMZN $200B, GOOGL ~$190B, MSFT $190B, META $125-145B), +77% YoY, with ~75% ($450B) going to AI infrastructure and none cutting guidance; but Broadcom this week declined to raise its $100B AI-chip target — a first 'no further upgrades' signal on the supply side — still accelerating yet more cautious at the margin

indicators.note: Amazon 尾随 FCF 暴跌约 95% 至 $1.2B，2026 全年预计转负约 -$17B（capex $200B）；Mag4 合计 FCF 料降至 2014 年以来最低，唯 MSFT 仍正增长——$725B capex 持续吞噬现金流，无季度新数据沿用 Q1 口径
indicators.note_en: Amazon's trailing FCF plunged ~95% to $1.2B and is projected to turn negative ~-$17B for full-year 2026 on $200B capex; combined Mag4 FCF is set to fall to its lowest since 2014, with only MSFT still growing — $725B of capex keeps devouring cash; no new quarterly print, carrying the Q1 read

indicators.name_zh: AI 占 VC 投资比重
indicators.note: Crunchbase/PitchBook Q1 2026：全球 VC 创纪录 $297-300B，AI 占 80-81%（$239-242B），较 2025 Q1 的 55% 大幅跃升；美元高度集中于 OpenAI/Anthropic/xAI 等少数巨额轮次，Anthropic 5/28 估值逼近 $1T，无季度新数据沿用 Q1 口径
indicators.note_en: Crunchbase/PitchBook Q1 2026: global VC hit a record $297-300B with AI taking 80-81% ($239-242B), up sharply from 55% in Q1 2025; dollars concentrate in a few mega-rounds for OpenAI/Anthropic/xAI, with Anthropic nearing a $1T valuation on May 28; no new quarterly print, carrying the Q1 read

indicators.note: NVDA 累计股权投资承诺 $110B+（含 OpenAI $30B）再加 $15B+ GPU 抵押债务；对 LTM 收入 $253.5B 的比率约 43%——每笔投资捆绑采购协议，循环融资规模仍远超 Lucent 1999 峰值 24%，无新披露沿用上期
indicators.note_en: NVDA's cumulative equity commitments top $110B (incl. $30B in OpenAI) plus $15B+ in GPU-backed debt; against $253.5B LTM revenue that is ~43% — every deal bundled with a purchase agreement, circular financing still far above Lucent's 1999 peak of 24%; no fresh disclosure, carried over

indicators.note: S5FI 6/5 收于约 54.6%（5/29 为 52.3%），仍处 40-60% 黄区；但周五 AI 板块普跌或令次周广度再承压，指数靠头部权重支撑、广度脆弱格局延续
indicators.note_en: S5FI closed near 54.6% on June 5 (52.3% on May 29), still inside the 40-60% yellow band; but Friday's broad AI decline may pressure breadth again next week — the index leans on mega-cap weights as fragile breadth persists

indicators.name_zh: 市值加权 vs 等权重
indicators.note: 市值加权仍领先：SPY YTD 11.69% vs RSP 10.12%（领先约 1.6pp）、近 3 月领先（1.5% vs 0.8%）；本周 AI 回撤令头部权重承压，6 月差略收窄至约 +5.5%，头部独涨格局仍在但边际松动
indicators.note_en: Cap-weighted still leads: SPY +11.69% YTD vs RSP +10.12% (~1.6pp ahead) and ahead over three months (1.5% vs 0.8%); this week's AI pullback pressured mega-cap weights, narrowing the 6-month spread to ~+5.5% — the top-heavy regime persists but loosens at the margin

indicators.name_zh: AI 龙头内部人卖买比
indicators.note: NVDA / PLTR / AVGO 内部人过去 12 个月累计卖出约 $4.6B、几乎零买入；个人层面仍以卖出为主、卖买比偏高但未及 2000 年 23x 极值；OpenInsider 聚合页受限，沿用 ~8x
indicators.note_en: NVDA / PLTR / AVGO insiders sold ~$4.6B over the trailing 12 months with virtually zero purchases; individual-level flows stay sell-heavy and the ratio is elevated but below the 2000 extreme of 23x; OpenInsider aggregation gated, carrying over ~8x

indicators.threshold_text: 洪流=红 / 升温=黄 / 平静=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Flood = red / Warming = yellow / Quiet = green
indicators.note: SpaceX IPO 定价敲定为固定 $135/股，拟售 5.556 亿股募资约 $75B（绿鞋另加 $11.2B）、估值 $1.77T，6/11 定价、6/12 纳斯达克挂牌（SPCX），将成史上最大 IPO；叠加 Anthropic、OpenAI、Databricks、Cerebras 合计 $100-200B 需求，超 2025 全年美股 IPO 市场 2-4 倍，但具体公司数仍 <10 未达洪流
indicators.note_en: SpaceX's IPO was fixed at $135/share, selling 555.6M shares to raise ~$75B (plus an $11.2B greenshoe) at a $1.77T valuation, pricing June 11 and listing on Nasdaq June 12 (SPCX) — the largest IPO ever; with Anthropic, OpenAI, Databricks and Cerebras, combined demand of $100-200B is 2-4x the entire 2025 US IPO market, yet the company count is still under 10, short of a Flood

indicators.note: ICE BofA HY OAS 最新约 2.72%（272 bps），远低于长期均值 3.94%、中位数 4.52%；即便本周 AI 股普跌，信用市场对 AI capex 激增与 $725B 烧钱仍未现压力，是当前最支撑多头的指标
indicators.note_en: ICE BofA HY OAS is near 2.72% (272 bps), far below the 3.94% long-run average and 4.52% median; even with this week's AI equity selloff, credit markets show no stress from the AI capex surge or $725B cash burn — the most bull-supportive indicator right now

indicators.name_zh: 数据中心 ABS 利差
indicators.threshold_text: 走阔 50bps+ = 红 / 稳定 = 黄 / 收窄 = 绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widening 50bps+ = red / Stable = yellow / Tightening = green
indicators.note: 顶级 DC ABS 利差近周收窄约 60bps（CloudHQ 5 年 AAA 4/20 定价 +125bps）；CoreWeave 关联数据中心 6/2 发行 $900M 五年期高收益债、利率降至 7.5%（4 月同期为 9.75%），数据中心融资条件边际明显改善，市场分层仍存但整体走向收窄
indicators.note_en: Top-rated DC ABS spreads tightened ~60bps in recent weeks (CloudHQ's 5-year AAA priced at +125bps on April 20); a CoreWeave-tied data center sold $900M of five-year high-yield notes on June 2 at 7.5% (vs 9.75% in April) — financing conditions improved markedly at the margin, and while the market stays bifurcated the overall trend is tightening

indicators.note: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda 90 日内无评级下调或违约；CoreWeave 总债务约 $21B、未来 12 个月到期约 $9.7B、债务/股本 7.39，再融资敞口仍是潜在风险点；本周 $900M 新债以 7.5% 顺利发行，短期流动性无虞
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda — no downgrades or defaults in 90 days; CoreWeave carries ~$21B of total debt with ~$9.7B maturing within 12 months and a 7.39 debt-to-equity ratio, so refinancing exposure remains a latent risk; this week's $900M note placed smoothly at 7.5%, easing near-term liquidity worries

indicators.name_zh: AI 行业 Token 月度环比
indicators.threshold_text: 收缩=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Contraction = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: OpenRouter 月 token 量稳在 100 万亿（周 25 万亿、半年 5 倍），全年有望突破千万亿（quadrillion）、单日已超 1 万亿；服务超 800 万用户、接入 400+ 模型，全产业用量继续加速
indicators.note_en: OpenRouter holds at 100T tokens/month (25T weekly, 5x in six months) and is on pace to top a quadrillion this year, already processing 1T+ per day; it serves 8M+ users across 400+ models — industry-wide usage keeps accelerating

indicators.name_zh: Token 增速 / 收入增速 比值
indicators.note: Anthropic ARR 升至约 $47B（2025 底 $10B，年化数倍），收入增速仍快于 token 量增速（半年 5 倍）；单 token 价值持续上行、付费需求真实，比值维持 <1x
indicators.note_en: Anthropic ARR climbed to ~$47B (from $10B at end-2025, several-fold annualized), with revenue still outpacing token-volume growth (5x in six months); per-token value keeps rising on genuine paid demand, holding the ratio below 1x

indicators.name_zh: AI 收入增速的二阶导
indicators.threshold_text: 减速=红 / 平稳=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Decel = red / Flat = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Anthropic run-rate 收入维持约 $47B（2 月 $14B → 3 月 $19B → 4 月 $30B → 5 月 $45-47B），约 35% 领先 OpenAI ~$33B、5/28 估值逼近 $1T；二阶导维持正向，唯 OpenAI 对其毛收入口径仍有约 $8B 争议
indicators.note_en: Anthropic's run-rate revenue holds near $47B (Feb $14B → Mar $19B → Apr $30B → May $45-47B), ~35% ahead of OpenAI's ~$33B, with its valuation nearing $1T on May 28; the 2nd derivative stays positive, though OpenAI still disputes ~$8B of Anthropic's gross-revenue accounting

indicators.note: McKinsey Q1 2026：72% 企业至少 1 项 AI workload 生产化（2024 55%、2020 20%）；Deloitte：67% 企业月耗 token 超 10 亿、25% 已将 ≥40% 实验转产；深度集成仍在爬坡但整体高位，无季度新数据沿用
indicators.note_en: McKinsey Q1 2026: 72% of enterprises run at least one AI workload in production (vs 55% in 2024, 20% in 2020); Deloitte: 67% now use 1B+ tokens monthly and 25% have moved 40%+ of experiments to production — deep integration still climbing but the headline stays high; no new quarterly survey, carried over

indicators.threshold_text: 负增长=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Negative = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Oracle RPO $455B（+359% YoY、云 RPO 近 +500%）超越 MSFT；MSFT 商业 RPO $392B（+51%）、Azure +40%；GCP 积压 $460B；合计超 $1.12T——递延需求持续强劲，无季度新数据沿用
indicators.note_en: Oracle RPO $455B (+359% YoY, cloud RPO up nearly 500%) overtook Microsoft; MSFT commercial RPO $392B (+51%), Azure +40%; GCP backlog $460B; combined pipeline tops $1.12T — deferred demand stays robust; no new quarterly print, carried over

indicators.threshold_text: 任何=红 / 调查=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any confirmed = red / Investigation = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 无主要 AI 龙头正式执法；iLearning Engines round-tripping 案 4 月被刑事起诉（虚增 $144M，已破产）但属小盘股；Burry 仍指控 Mag7 借延长服务器折旧虚增 2026-28 利润、Super Micro 受 SEC 调查，均非核心 AI 龙头，本周无新增执法
indicators.note_en: No formal enforcement against a major AI leader; the iLearning Engines round-tripping case was criminally charged in April ($144M inflated, already bankrupt) but is a microcap; Burry keeps alleging Mag7 inflates 2026-28 profits via extended server depreciation and Super Micro remains under SEC scrutiny, but none are core AI bellwethers — no new enforcement this week

indicators.threshold_text: 加息=红 / 通胀压力=黄 / 降息=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Hike = red / Inflation pressure = yellow / Cut = green
indicators.note: Warsh 主持 6/17 FOMC，CME 维持概率 99.4%、加息概率极低；利率维持 3.5-3.75%，通胀仍超 2% 目标、劳动力强劲，higher-for-longer 延续，对极度拉伸的估值构成持续压制
indicators.note_en: Warsh chairs the June 17 FOMC with CME showing 99.4% hold odds and a negligible hike probability; rates stay at 3.5-3.75% while inflation runs above the 2% target and the labor market holds firm — higher-for-longer persists, a continued headwind for extremely stretched valuations

indicators.name_zh: 资本开支指引市场反应
indicators.threshold_text: 系统性惩罚=红 / 偶发=黄 / 奖励=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Systematic punishment = red / Episodic = yellow / Rewarded = green
indicators.note: 本周 AI 板块明显回撤：Broadcom 仅维持、拒绝上调 $100B AI 芯片目标即暴跌约 15%，NVDA 周五跌 6.2%；叠加 Q1 财报 3 罚 1 奖，市场对 AI 资本开支叙事的容忍度持续下降，惩罚由偶发向系统性逼近，但尚未全面系统化，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: The AI complex sold off this week: Broadcom plunged ~15% merely for reaffirming — not raising — its $100B AI-chip target, and NVDA fell 6.2% on Friday; on top of Q1's 3-punished/1-rewarded tally, the market's tolerance for the AI-capex narrative keeps eroding, with punishment edging from episodic toward systematic — but not yet fully systematic, stays yellow

indicators.threshold_text: 普遍承认过热=红 / 部分=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widespread acknowledgment = red / Partial = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 对冲表态持续：Pichai 承认 AI 热潮存在"非理性"、"无公司能免疫包括谷歌"；Dimon"部分项目确在泡沫中，但整体大概率回本"；本周无重大新增表态，频率与强度仍偏高但 CEO 仍坚持 capex 合理，未达全体一致承认过热
indicators.note_en: Hedging continues: Pichai concedes 'irrationality' in the AI boom and 'no company is immune, including us'; Dimon says 'some of these things may be in a bubble, but in total it'll probably pay off'; no major new remarks this week — frequency and intensity stay elevated, yet CEOs still defend capex as rational, short of a universal 'overheated' consensus
